# Full Markdown Extension (.markdown)

This file uses the `.markdown` extension — the original long-form extension.

## Standard Syntax

- **Bold** and *italic*
- ~~Strikethrough~~
- `inline code`

## Blockquote

> This is a blockquote.
> It can span multiple lines.

## Code Block

```javascript
const greet = (name) => `Hello, ${name}!`;
console.log(greet("World"));
```

## Checklist

- [x] Supports .markdown extension
- [x] Renders GFM tables
- [ ] Needs more tests
